query:
Plan a trip with the following preferences:
Origin: Dubai
Destination: Luxor Governorate
Dates: 2026-05-02 to 2026-05-03
Budget: Cheap
Party: Family
Interests: Cultural Tourism, Photographing, Food Tourism

results.assertion: Travel Plan correctly strictly follows the schema.
results.reason: The travel plan is a valid JSON object with the expected top-level keys (trip_name, itinerary, budget_breakdown, landmarks) and nested structures. Data types are generally appropriate, though 'cost' is a string instead of a number, which is a minor deviation but still parseable.

results.assertion: Accommodation suggestions are relevant to the city and user preferences.
results.reason: The suggested accommodation, Bob Marley House Sherif Hotel, is located in Luxor and costs EGP 35, which aligns with the user's 'Cheap' budget preference and the destination city.

results.assertion: Budget constraints are respected throughout the itinerary.
results.reason: The plan explicitly states 'luxury_level': 'Cheap' and provides a 'Total Estimated Cost' of EGP 7150. For a 2-day family trip including accommodation, activities, and food, this total is exceptionally low and aligns with a 'cheap' budget. While some individual activity costs seem arbitrary or inflated for generic places, the overall estimated total remains very low.

results.assertion: The daily sequence of activities is logically ordered chronologically (morning, afternoon, evening).
results.reason: All activities within each day are listed with sequential time slots, ensuring a chronological flow from morning to evening.

judge_grader.reason: All constraints from the user query are satisfied by the travel plan.

generated_plan.trip_summary: A budget-friendly family adventure from Cairo to Luxor, exploring the rich history, vibrant culture, and culinary delights of this ancient city. Focus on iconic temples, royal tombs, and local experiences.

itinerary.day: Day 1: Royal Tombs, Grand Temples & Nile Views

activities.title: Hotel Check-in: Bob Marley House Sherif Hotel
activities.description: Arrive in Luxor and check into your budget-friendly hotel, the Bob Marley House Sherif Hotel. Settle in before embarking on a day of ancient discoveries.

activities.title: Valley of the Kings
activities.description: Embark on a morning journey to the legendary Valley of the Kings, the burial place of pharaohs for nearly 500 years. Explore the rock-cut tombs and marvel at the intricate hieroglyphs and paintings.

activities.title: Tombs of the Nobles
activities.description: Visit the Tombs of the Nobles, offering a glimpse into the daily lives and beliefs of high-ranking officials and nobles through their beautifully decorated tombs.

activities.title: Colossi of Memnon
activities.description: Stop for a quick photo opportunity at the Colossi of Memnon, two massive stone statues of Pharaoh Amenhotep III, standing guard on the West Bank.

activities.title: Lunch at Kaya Restoz
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious lunch at Kaya Restoz, offering a selection of cafe and patisserie specialties.

activities.title: Mummification Museum
activities.description: Delve into the ancient Egyptian art of mummification at this fascinating museum, showcasing tools, materials, and mummified remains.

activities.title: Karnak Temple
activities.description: Experience the grandeur of Karnak Temple, a vast open-air museum and the second-largest ancient religious site in the world. (Note: A shorter visit due to time constraints, focus on main highlights).

activities.title: Luxor Temple & Ticket Office
activities.description: Explore the beautiful Luxor Temple, especially captivating as the sun sets and the temple is illuminated. Your visit includes passing through the Luxor Temple Ticket Office.

activities.title: Luxor Sign
activities.description: Capture a memorable family photo at the iconic Luxor Sign, a popular landmark in the city.

activities.title: Maadi Square
activities.description: Take a brief stroll through Maadi Square, observing local life and the city's ambiance.

activities.title: Bird Guides
activities.description: Discover local bird guides, a unique cultural experience to observe and learn about the local birdlife around Luxor.

activities.title: Queen’s Island
activities.description: Enjoy views or a brief stop at Queen’s Island, offering picturesque scenes along the Nile.

activities.title: Dinner at Al Sahaby Lane Restaurant
activities.description: Conclude your day with a late dinner at Al Sahaby Lane Restaurant, offering local and international cuisine.

activities.title: Temple of Hatshepsut
activities.description: Begin your day on the West Bank visiting the magnificent Mortuary Temple of Hatshepsut, a unique and impressive structure built into the cliffside.

activities.title: Luxor Museum
activities.description: Cross back to the East Bank to explore the Luxor Museum, home to a splendid collection of artifacts from the ancient Theban temples and necropolis.

activities.title: Lunch at Kaya Restoz
activities.description: Enjoy lunch once more at Kaya Restoz, savoring their cafe and patisserie offerings.

activities.title: Karnak (Second Visit)
activities.description: Revisit a different section of Karnak or enjoy a deeper exploration of its vast complex, focusing on areas you might have missed or want to re-experience.

activities.title: First Pylon Luxor Temple
activities.description: A focused visit to the First Pylon of Luxor Temple, an impressive gateway that marks the entrance to this grand ancient site.

activities.title: Gateway of Ptolemy III Euergetes
activities.description: Explore the ancient Gateway of Ptolemy III Euergetes, an important historical feature.

activities.title: Banana Island Sara
activities.description: Enjoy a tranquil visit to Banana Island Sara, a lush green island on the Nile, offering a relaxing escape.

activities.title: JIMMY GUIDEZILLA-PRIVATE EGYPT TOURS BY AHMED KHATTAB
activities.description: Explore local tour guiding services, possibly to inquire about future adventures or learn about local travel options.

activities.title: Luxor Tours & Excursions
activities.description: Discover local tourism operators, a great opportunity for cultural insights and planning future trips.

activities.title: Mado Tourguide Luxor
activities.description: Another opportunity to interact with local tour guides and learn about customized Luxor experiences.

activities.title: Necropoli (cimitero) tomba di Neferrenpet
activities.description: A brief stop at the Necropolis, including the Tomb of Neferrenpet, offering a glimpse into ancient burial practices.

activities.title: الاقصر واسوان (Luxor and Aswan)
activities.description: A final cultural stop, exploring options or information about Luxor and Aswan, perhaps for future travel plans.

activities.title: Dinner at Al Sahaby Lane Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy your final dinner in Luxor at Al Sahaby Lane Restaurant, reflecting on your memorable trip.
